01 Foundation Layer

Cloud and Infra Foundation.

Network, identity, runtime substrate, observability.

Why foundation comes first

Every AI-native pilot eventually meets the same wall...

This chapter is opinionated on purpose...

Definition

The foundation layer is the set of cloud primitives...

The three layers of foundation

Foundation itself decomposes into three sub-layers...

Foundation in three sub-layers, dependency direction shown

Layer 1, network and identity

Every workload terminates TLS at one of two ingress points...

Layer 2, runtime substrate

The runtime substrate is the contract...

Layer 3, observability

Logs are structured...

Bootstrapping the foundation

The bootstrap is a single opinionated script...

~/foundation, bash

Notice three things...

Production checklist

Twelve checks. If any is red, the workload does not enter production...

Monday morning

Five concrete actions to take this week...
